other_findings.finding: Mast cells were primarily localized in the submucosal regions of the adult gut and showed limited abundance in other regions.

evidence_quotes.quote: Cluster M_A_Mast_cell was annotated as Mast cells based on high expression of CPA3, TPSAB1, and TPSB2 (Supplementary Table S3).
evidence_quotes.context: Cluster annotation and marker gene identification

evidence_quotes.quote: Mast cells were primarily localized in the submucosal regions of the adult gut and showed limited abundance in other regions.
